final_answer: Hi, my name is Chen Johnson and I'm located in Houston, TX 77004. I'd like to request a change to my order W5061109 — I need to swap my wireless earbuds for a blue-colored variant. Please verify that the price of the new item is the same or lower than what I originally paid before making any changes. If there are multiple blue options available, please select the one without water resistance. Could you please resolve this as soon as possible? Thank you!
